claim_short: 2510.12540 Gerhold Scherer Shalit Empirical bounds for commuting dilations of free unitaries and the universal commuting dilation constant. Source conjectures C_2 <= 2 sqrt(2/3) < 2 for the universal commuting dilation constant for pairs, based on empirical evidence for random Haar unitaries.
